name: Cafe Amor
overview: The 'Blind Date Cafe', operated by the MCs/cast members Lee Juk, Yoo In Na, and Yang Se Hyung, will be a cafe specializing in blind date meetings. The cast members will observe various non-celebrities undergo blind dates, while serving and operating the cafe.

trailers.title: sundabang 이적X유인나X양세형이 맞선 카페를 오픈합니다 180330 EP.1
